description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building with a dark exterior siding and large, light-framed windows. The front features a three-car garage, a central entryway with double doors, and a landscaped garden area. Expansive porches and decks wrap around multiple sides, providing ample outdoor living space with railings and outdoor furniture. The roof is flat with multiple sections, and the interior is visible, showing open-plan living areas, bedrooms, and communal spaces. The window arrangement is varied, with large grouped windows on the front and sides, and smaller windows on the rear. The overall design is modern with clean lines and a focus on indoor-outdoor connectivity.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with dark siding, large windows, multiple porches, and a flat roof, featuring a three-car garage and landscaped entry.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three-car garage, main entry with double doors, landscaped garden, and large front-facing windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wraparound porch, outdoor seating area, and the open-plan interior layout visible through the windows.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a long row of windows and doors, with less exterior detailing and a more private facade.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the main deck, garden area, and the transition between indoor and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
